task_description: Execute Phase 4 (Runtime Integration and Local Developer Experience) and Phase 5 (Unified Product Shell and Design System) of the Quant Ecosystem autonomous roadmap. Phase 4 adds dev scripts, env examples, health endpoints, service discovery, demo seed data, and developer tooling. Phase 5 expands the shared-ui with unified app shell, design tokens, guards, onboarding, state components, and cross-app microfeatures.

verification.summary: All gates pass: typecheck 71/71, build 50/50, test 74/74, lint 60/60. Tests for new packages (health-server 5 tests, service-discovery 7 tests, shell-components 32 tests) exercise real component behavior and would fail if code reverted.

issues_fixed: Issue 1: Aligned stub service HEALTH_PORT defaults with service-discovery registry ports
Issue 2: Changed startHealthServer readiness checks to run concurrently via Promise.allSettled
Issue 3: Added NODE_ENV=production guard to seed script
Issue 4: Added JSDoc to guard components documenting UI-only access control
Issue 5: Added comment noting accessibility tokens are Tailwind utility classes
issues_skipped: Issue 6: No input validation in onboarding - skipped (presentation-only components)
Issue 7: Missing docker-compose.dev.yml - false positive (file already exists)
